Graduate Researcher · CU Boulder

Emily
Maxwell Outland

Human factors, space systems, and the machines in between.

I'm a graduate researcher at CU Boulder studying how humans and autonomous systems work better together. My research spans explainable AI for robot motion planning, physiological state modeling for spaceflight, and the trust dynamics that shape human-machine teams. When I'm not in the lab, I'm probably brewing tea, getting submitted at jiu-jitsu practice, or quietly evangelizing Obsidian.
